name: Ad Brief Template
description: Ad Brief Template - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Campaign Brief Fill in the strategic brief with objectives, audience, and messaging. 2. Creative Brief Define the creative direction, tone, and visual references. 3. Media Plan Map out channels, formats, placements, and flight dates. 4. Ad Specs Library Reference ad specifications for all major platforms. 5. Budget Tracker Allocate and track spend across production and media. 6. Approval Workflow Route briefs through stakeholders with the built-in approval tracker. 7. Performance Tracker Measure ad performance against KPIs post-launch. 8. Brief Library Archive compl

sections.description: Auto-calculated summary of your data. Complete the working sections to see results here.

fields.label: Business Objective
fields.placeholder: What business goal does this campaign support?
fields.helpText: What business goal does this campaign support?

fields.label: Marketing Objective
fields.placeholder: Specific marketing objective (awareness, leads, conversions, etc.)
fields.helpText: Specific marketing objective (awareness, leads, conversions, etc.)

fields.label: Campaign KPIs
fields.helpText: Key performance indicators and targets

fields.label: Key Insight
fields.placeholder: The human truth or market insight driving this campaign
fields.helpText: The human truth or market insight driving this campaign

fields.label: Single-Minded Proposition
fields.placeholder: The ONE thing we want the audience to take away
fields.helpText: The ONE thing we want the audience to take away

fields.label: Reason to Believe
fields.placeholder: Why should the audience believe our proposition?
fields.helpText: Why should the audience believe our proposition?

fields.label: Competitive Context
fields.placeholder: Key competitors and how we differentiate
fields.helpText: Key competitors and how we differentiate

sections.title: Target Audience
sections.description: [Campaign Brief] Complete the Target Audience section

sections.title: Primary Audience
sections.description: [Campaign Brief] Complete the Primary Audience section

fields.label: Demographics
fields.helpText: Age, gender, income, location, education

fields.label: Psychographics
fields.helpText: Interests, values, lifestyle, attitudes

fields.label: Behavioural Signals
fields.placeholder: Online behaviour, purchase patterns, media consumption
fields.helpText: Online behaviour, purchase patterns, media consumption

fields.label: Pain Points
fields.placeholder: Problems or frustrations the audience faces
fields.helpText: Problems or frustrations the audience faces

fields.label: Current Perception
fields.placeholder: What does the audience currently think/feel about us?
fields.helpText: What does the audience currently think/feel about us?

fields.label: Desired Perception
fields.placeholder: What do we want them to think/feel after the campaign?
fields.helpText: What do we want them to think/feel after the campaign?

sections.title: General
sections.description: [Creative Brief] Fill in the fields below

fields.label: Creative Concept
fields.placeholder: The big idea that brings the strategy to life
fields.helpText: The big idea that brings the strategy to life

fields.label: Tone of Voice
fields.placeholder: How should the ad feel? (e.g., Bold, Warm, Witty, Authoritative)
fields.helpText: How should the ad feel? (e.g., Bold, Warm, Witty, Authoritative)

fields.label: Visual Direction
fields.placeholder: Describe the look and feel — colours, imagery style, mood
fields.helpText: Describe the look and feel — colours, imagery style, mood

fields.label: Headline Direction
fields.helpText: 3-5 headline options or direction

fields.label: Body Copy Direction
fields.placeholder: Key messages and copy points to include
fields.helpText: Key messages and copy points to include

fields.label: Call to Action
fields.placeholder: What do we want the audience to do?
fields.helpText: What do we want the audience to do?

fields.label: Mandatory Inclusions
fields.helpText: Logos, legal disclaimers, taglines, hashtags

fields.label: Mandatory Exclusions
fields.placeholder: Competitor mentions, off-brand imagery, restricted claims
fields.helpText: Competitor mentions, off-brand imagery, restricted claims

fields.label: Reference Examples
fields.placeholder: Links or descriptions of ads that capture the desired direction
fields.helpText: Links or descriptions of ads that capture the desired direction

fields.label: Format Requirements
fields.helpText: Sizes, formats, aspect ratios needed

fields.label: Deliverables
fields.placeholder: List all deliverables needed from creative team
fields.helpText: List all deliverables needed from creative team
